description:
# Run initial product import

For onboarding an existing store with an existing catalog, run a one-time import.

Click the action to open the **Shopify Import Products** page. It paginates through all products on the store. For each product, it:

1. Creates an Nexus Item (skips if the SKU already exists).
2. Creates the variant Items.
3. Sets `shopify_selling_rate` from Shopify's `variant.price`.
4. Creates the corresponding **Ecommerce Item** linkage.

Run this once during onboarding. After this, ongoing changes flow via webhooks (Shopify → Nexus) or scheduled jobs (Nexus → Shopify) depending on your toggles.

> If your Shopify store is empty and you'll be uploading items from Nexus instead, you can skip this step.
name: Run Initial Product Import
title: Run initial product import
